titleStmt.title: SII 5.734: original edition by H. Krishna Sastri
No. 734. (A.R. No. 170 of 1895). ON THE NORTH WALL OF THE SAME MANDAPA.

revisionDesc.change: Further conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)
Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti śrī . pūmalaṟ tiruvum porujaya maṭantaiyun tāmaraikkuvimulait taṭappuyat tiruppa vetanāvil veḷḷitaṭ ṭāmaraik kātalmātu kaviṉpeṟak tiḷaippa veṇṭirai yuṭutta maṇṭiṇi taṭakkait tirunilamaṭantai [yu�]maiyiṟ kaḷippac camaiyanitiyun tarumamun taḻaippa yimaiyavar viḻākko
ṭi yiṭantoṟu meṭuppak karuṅkali kaṉal keṭak kaṭavuḷ vetiya raruntoḻil veḻvic ceṅkaṉal vaḷarac curutiyun tamiḻuñ colvaḷaṅ kulavap porutiṟalāḻi pūtalañ cūḻvara Orukai yirucevi mummata nāṟkoṭ ṭayirāpata mutal ceytik koṟṟat teṇṭicai yāṉai yerutta merik kaṇṭanā ṭemateṉak kayal ka
ḷikūrak kocalan tuḷuvaṅ koṅku kuccaram pocalam makatam poppaḷam puṇṭaraṅ kaliṅka miḻaṅ kaṭāraṅ kavuṭan teliṅkañ coṉakañ ciṉaka mutalāyi vitimuṟai tikaḻa vevveṟu vakutta mutunilak kiḻamaiyil muṭipuṉai ventaṟ korutaṉi nāyakaṉeṉ ṟulakettac ceṅko loccik koṟṟat tāḷk kuḷir
kuṭainiḻaṟ kaṟṟaikkavari kāvalar vica viṭaikatir navamaṇi virasiṁ hāsaṉat tuṭaṉ muṭicūṭi yuyarkulat tiruveṉa malaṟkaraṅ kuvittup pārttipa maṅkaiyar tiraṇṭu vaṇaṅkuñ ceṉṉiyiṟ cuṭaroḷi mavulic cuṭarmaṇi meliṭac civanta Iṇaimalaṟ ciṟaṭik kaṉakamatukaraṅ kamalameṉ ṟaṇukum Ulakamuḻutuṭaiyāroṭum viṟ
ṟiruntaruḷiya ṣrikomāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu vaṉaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīsunda rapāṇṭiyade vaṟkku yāṇṭu nālāvati ṉetirāmāṇṭi ṉetirāmāṇṭu māci mātaṅ kiḻkaḷakkūṟṟattup piramatecañ civallabha maṅkalattu ma hāsabhai- yom śrīvallavaccaturvetimaṅkalattu śrīkayilāsamuṭaiyaār koyil tāṉattārukkum civappirāmaṇaruṅ kaṇ
ṭu Iccikayilātamuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟkkuc cokkāṇṭār kaṇṭa piramiyaṉcantikkum Ivar piṟanta nāḷile tirttam piracātikka kaṇṭa tirunāḷukkum tiruppaṭimāṟṟuḷḷiṭṭu veṇṭum nittal nimantaṅkaḷukkum Eṅkaḷūr kār picāṉam viḷaiyun nilattile patiṉkala varicai nilam Oṉṟarai veliyum Eṇkala varicai nilam Oṉṟe kāl veliyum Ākak kaṭamaiyiṟukkuṅ kolāle Iraṇ
ṭemukkāl veli nilam Iṟaiyiliyāka Iṭṭup piracātañ ceytaruḷiṉa tirumukamun tiruvāykkeḻviyum Uḷvariyum Uṭaiyār kaṭaiyiṭum vantamaiyil Iraṇṭe mukkāl veliyil patiṉkala varicai nilam Oṉṟarai velikku maṇaṟkkuṭip pilāṟṟukku kiḻakku muṉṟāṅkāl kiḻkaṇṇāṟṟu teṟkku mutaṟ pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaiya nila(m)ṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyun nālāṅkāl me
l kaṇṇāṟṟu teṟkku Iraṇṭām pāṭakan teṟkaṭaiya nilam Araimā muntirikai yuṅ kiḻkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Iraṇṭām pāṭakan nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum munṟām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum Añcāṅkāl melkaṇṇāṟṟu teṟkku Añcām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaiya nila(m)ṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Āṟāṅkāl melkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Eḻām pāṭakan teṟkaṭaiya nila(m)ṅ kāṇi
Araikkāṇiyum Eṭṭām pāṭakat teṟkaṭaiya nila(m)ṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Oṉpatāṅkāl kiḻkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Oṉp(ā)tām pāṭakan nila(m)ṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum pattām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum paṉṉiraṇṭām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉmuṉṟām pāṭakam meṟkaṭaiya (na)nila(ma)ṅ kā
ṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻaraiyum patiṉālām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉañcām(p) pāṭakan nila(la)m mukkāṇiyum patiṉāṟām (pa)pāṭakan nilam Araimā muntirikaiyum pattāṅkāl melkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku pattām pāṭaka nilaṅ kāṇiyaraikkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakanilam mukkāṇiyu
m patiṉmuṉṟām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉālām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉañcām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉāṟām pāṭakan nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyuṅ kiḻkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Oṉpatām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum pattām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum paṉṉiraṇṭā
m pāṭaka nila mukkāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikai kiḻaraip patiṉmuṉṟām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉālām pāṭakan nila mukkāṇiyum patiṉañcām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉāṟām pāṭakan nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum patiṉoṉṟāṅkāl melkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Eṭṭām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum pattām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum Añcā
ṅ kaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Eḻām pāṭaka nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻaraiyum Oṉp(ā)tām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum pattām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum paṉṉiraṇṭāṅkāl melkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Eḻām pāṭaka nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Eṭṭām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum Oṉpatām pāṭakam teṟkaṭaiya nilam Araikkāṇi mun
tirikaiyum pattām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum kiḻkkaṇṇāṟu teṟkku Āṟām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum Eḻām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum Eṭṭām pāṭaka nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Oṉpatām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum pattām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaiya nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum patiṉmūṉṟām pāṭakan nilam mukkā
ṇiyum patiṉmuṉṟāṅkāl melkaṇṇāṟu teṟkkup pattām pāṭakan teṟkaṭaiya nilam Araiymā varaikkāṇiyuṅ kiḻaraiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakan nilam mukkāṇiyum paṉṉiraṇṭām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉmuṉṟām pāṭakak kuṟai nilam Araimā Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻmukkāle Araikkālum
patiṉālām pāṭakak kuṟai nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaik kiḻaraikkālum Ākap patiṉkala varicai nilam Oṉṟaṟai veliyum Eṇkala varicai nilam Oṉṟe kāl velikku vāsu t(e)da vavāykkālukku meṟku muṉṟāṅkāl kiḻkaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku Iraṇṭām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum nālām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum
Añcām pāṭakatti li[runta perumāṉ cuntarapāṇṭiyaviṇṇakar Emperumā ṉiṟaiyili nikki nila maraimā muntirikaiyum Āṟām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum Eḻām pāṭakam nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Eṭṭām pāṭakam teṟkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Oṉpatām pāṭakaṅ kiḻkkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Arai
kkāṇiyum pattām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nila maraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum melkaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku mutal pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilam kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Iraṇṭām pāṭakam nilam Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum nālām pāṭakam nila maraimāvum Añcām pāṭakam
nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Āṟāmpāṭakam teṟkaṭaya nila maraimā muntirikaiyum Eḻām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum Eṭṭām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum Oṉpatām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum patiṉoṉṟām pāṭaka meṟkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araik kāṇiyum nālāṅkāl kiḻkaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku Oṉpatām pāṭakam
nilam mukkāṇiyum pattām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum melkaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku Āṟām pāṭakam teṟkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Eḻām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi muntirikaiyum Eṭṭām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum Añcāṅ kāl kiḻkaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku Iraṇṭām pāṭakan teṟkaṭa
ya nila maraimāviṉ kiḻkālum muṉṟām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum nālām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Añcām pāṭakam nilan mukkāṇiyum Āṟām pāṭakan teṟkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Ippāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nila maraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Eṭṭām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum mel
kaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku Iraṇṭām pāṭakam nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum muṉṟām pāṭakam teṟkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum nālām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum Añcām pāṭakam nilaṅ mukkāṇiyum Āṟām pāṭakam nilam mukkāṇiyum Eḻām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇiyum Āṟāṅkāl kiḻkaṇṇāṟu vaṭakku
mutal pāṭakam nila mukkāṇiyum muṉṟām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nilaṅ kāṇi Araikkāṇiyum nālāma pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum Añcām pāṭaka nilam muntirikaiyiṉ kiḻkālum Ippāṭakam vaṭakkaṭaya nila maraikkāṇi muntirikaiyum Āṟām pāṭaka nilam mukkāṇiyum Eḻām pāṭakam vaṭakkaṭa,Five lines at the end are very much damaged, the stones having peeled off in many places.
Digital edition of SII 5.734 by converted to DHARMA conventions by Renato Dávalos.
